AssertionError: Expected 200 for https://tutorialsninja.com/demo/index.php?route=product/search&search=MacBook, got 415
assert 415 == <HTTPStatus.OK: 200>
 +  where 415 = <Response [415]>.status_code
history.trace:
self = <test_contracts.TestPublicEndpointContract object at 0x7f668e221010>
public_service = <services.api.public_service.PublicService object at 0x7f668d3c9670>
api_base_url = 'https://tutorialsninja.com/demo'
case = EndpointCase(path='/index.php?route=product/search&search=MacBook', required_text='MacBook')

    @allure.title("Mapped public endpoints return OK and expected page markers")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        "case",
        PUBLIC_ENDPOINT_MAP.values(),
        ids=PUBLIC_ENDPOINT_MAP.keys(),
    )
    def test_public_endpoint_map_returns_expected_marker(
        self, public_service: PublicService, api_base_url: str, case: EndpointCase
    ):
        url = f"{api_base_url}{case.path}"
    
        with allure.step(f"GET {url}"):
            resp = public_service.get_path(case.path)
    
        with allure.step("Assert response status and HTML marker"):
>           assert resp.status_code == HTTP_OK, (
                f"Expected {HTTP_OK} for {url}, got {resp.status_code}"
            )
E           AssertionError: Expected 200 for https://tutorialsninja.com/demo/index.php?route=product/search&search=MacBook, got 415
E           assert 415 == <HTTPStatus.OK: 200>
E            +  where 415 = <Response [415]>.status_code
